titleRomaji: Kutabire Salarymen no Ore, 7-nenburi ni Saikai Shita Bishoujo JK to Dousei wo Hajimaru

I, a Tired Office Worker, Start Living Together with a Beautiful Highschool Girl Whom I Met Again after 7 Years
synopsis: A beautiful high school girl suddenly shows up at the door of Yuya Amae, a tired salaryman! It is Aoi Shiratori, his childhood friend, who has come to ask Yuya to marry her… again! And so begins their life of living together! Yuya tries to act like a responsible guardian, but Aoi's aggressive approach is causing his resolve to waver…? A JK childhood friend with a marriage proposal! A sweet ideal romantic comedy! (Source: ComicWalker, translated)

synopsis: A lone diner stands in the remote frontier. Drawn by the cooking of a human known only as “Master,” demons, elves, and others of all races gather to savor his food. On the stage of this small restaurant, a gourmet tale of joy and sorrow alike begins to unfold! (Source: Kodansha, translated)
synonyms: Meals on the Frontier of Another World

synopsis: Spin-off manga of THE IDOLM@STER Cinderella Girls , focusing on younger idols. The manga centers around girls under 149 centimeters tall (under about 4-feet, 11-inches) who aspire to be idols despite not having a producer or gigs. However, maybe with a marvelous dress, a marvelous stage, and a marvelous prince ... The new Cinderella story follows these small idols and their small rookie producer. (Source: Anime News Network, edited) Note: The chapter count includes 152 chapters released in magazine and 33 extra chapters.

title: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Houkago, Boku wa Kimi ni Naru
titleNative: 放課後、ぼくは君になる
synonyms: After School I'll Be You
synopsis: Akiba, a high school boy who is seriously into cross-dressing cosplay, devotes himself to emulating his "oshi." Then one day, while he was dressing up as his favorite character, all alone in the club room, he is discovered by Shibuya, a gorgeous gal that he has a crush on...? This is the start of a secret relationship between these two polar opposites! They will devote their youthful enthusiasm to a life of "oshi promotion"! (Source: Shonen Sirius, translated)

title: Bing Ruo Meimei Zong Shi Xiao Xiang Wo
titleRomaji: Bing Ruo Meimei Zong Shi Xiao Xiang Wo
titleNative: 病弱妹妹总是肖想我
synonyms: My Sickly Sister Always Misses Me
synopsis: Xu Yulian is the eldest daughter of a wealthy family, smart and beautiful. Her life should've been a smooth ride, until she ran into a stumbling block named "Xu Wenjiao." Her sister came out of nowhere and became the person she hates the most. When she was a child, the frail Xu Wenjiao occupied all of her mother's time and attention. After she grew up, Xu Yulian had a crush on the neighbor girl who had just returned from studying abroad. But before she could get up the courage, she saw the girl confess to Xu Wenjiao instead. In this house, it's going to be either her or Xu Wenjiao, one or the other. Xu Yulian got so angry that she actually packed her bags to leave home, but her sister, who always seemed so weak and frail, suddenly grabbed her by the wrist wrist and pushed her into the corner. Xu Wenjiao looked at her jealously and whispered in her ear: "Sister, why do you like her but not me?" Xu Yulian blushed, "Xu Wenjiao, are you crazy? Have you been reading too many bad romance novels to be acting this way?" (Source: Bilibili, translated)

synopsis: Astronomy and geology are fun…! Mira, who promised to “find an asteroid” with the boy she found at the campsite as a child. She tried to join the astronomy club, but from this year the “astronomy club” and the “geology research society” merged into the “earth sciences club”!? Let’s go search for the asteroid that we promised to look for that day. (Source: Manga Time Kirara Carat, translated)

title: Tuojiang
titleRomaji: Tuojiang
titleNative: 脱缰
synonyms: Mad for Love
เอาตัวรอดจากรัชทายาทคลั่งรัก
synopsis: After traveling into a historical BL novel, the actor Lin Yan gains a special ability: fast-traveling through a skill called [Escape Death]. His first mission? To secretly orchestrate an attack on Prince Qi Zhen, which leads to the prince becoming the villain. Lin Yan’s first identity in this world is none other than Lin Shou Yan, the prince’s foolish fiancé. But as he plays his role, he accidentally captures the prince’s heart, and his fake death turns out to be the key reason Qi Zhen becomes a ruthless tyrant! A cold, overthinking tsundere prince and his scheming, perverted fiancé—chaos ensues! (Source: KuiaKan Manhua, translated)

However, after a chance meeting at the school camping trip, they started talking with each other, but only outside of school. They are both unsure of each other's "true feelings." (Source: Comic Howl, translated)

title: Watashi Datte Seishun Shitai desu yo, Hontou wa.
titleRomaji: Watashi Datte Seishun Shitai desu yo, Hontou wa.
titleNative: 私だって青春したいですよ、本当は。
synonyms: The truth is, I want to enjoy my youth too.
I want to be young too, actually.
synopsis: Her hobbies are reading, and she's average at studying and sports. Otobe Murasaki is a high school student who lives a quiet life, thinking she's just a mob character, but she doesn't like Fujimi Akiko, who is always the center of attention in the class. However, as soon as she becomes a member of the gardening committee like Akiko, she quickly falls in love with her, as she talks to her in a friendly manner. Just as she is wondering if there's any way she can get closer to her, she happens to come across Akiko crying after a breakup... A girls' love comedy about a simple mob character and a sparkling girl with a difficult future ahead! (source: Ichijinsha, translated)

titleRomaji: Sudi Kan Wo De Yanshen Zhujian Bianzhi
titleNative: 宿敌看我的眼神逐渐变质
synonyms: The Way My Old Enemy
Looks at Me Gradually Degenerates
synopsis: In Yu Wan's eyes, Ni Shang is a bitch who has been her arch-nemesis since childhood. The only reason she accepted an internship at Ni Shang's company was because her father threatened to force her to give up her dreams of becoming a dancer. Trying to annoy Ni Shang in any way she can, Yu Wan claimed she was a lesbian to scare her away. But why is Ni Shang looking at me so strangely all of a sudden? And why is her hands all over me? (Source: Bilibili, translated) Note: Chapter count includes 5 extras.

title: Yueguo Chenshi de Ge
titleRomaji: Yueguo Chenshi de Ge
titleNative: 越过尘世的歌
synonyms: The Song That Transcends This World
Fugue Across Worlds
synopsis: During troubled times, Weng Shaoying is one of the most famous singers in Dongping. Many people go to Song of Fairyland just to see her perform. However, under her glamorous facade, she has been controlled for more than 10 years. On the other side of Dongping is Bi Xing Tang, one of the most famous gangs there. After her father’s death, Yanchu became the young female leader of Bi Xing Tang, which caused a lot of rumors to spread. On one inevitably fortuitous night, the two happened to meet. At that time, neither of them knew that they would eventually become the most important person in the other’s life. Starting from that night onwards, the gears in Shaoying and Yanchu’s fate will forever be rotating together. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

titleRomaji: Akuyaku Onzoushi no Kanchigai Seija Seikatsu: Nidome no Jinsei wa Yaritai Houdaishitai Dake na Noni
titleNative: 悪役御曹司の勘違い聖者生活 ～二度目の人生はやりたい放題したいだけなのに～
synonyms: The Mistaken Saintly Life of a Villainous Scion ~ I Just Want to Do Whatever I Want for the Second Time in My Life!
synopsis: Ogre Verret, the eldest son of the Verret family, a family renowned for its viciousness, is a reincarnator. He was always getting cheated in his previous life because of his kind nature, and he wants to take this opportunity to enjoy the life of a powerful villain who can do whatever he wants. He is supposed be pushing the limits of tyranny, but... "Well done! Ogre-sama!" Even though he is behaving in an "insolent manner,'' for some reason those around him seem to be taking it in stride...⁉ The misunderstood villain's life as a saint begins! (Source: Dengeki Comic Regulus, translated)

titleRomaji: Isekai demo Bunan ni Ikitai Shoukougun
titleNative: 異世界でも無難に生きたい症候群
synonyms: ขอให้อยู่รอดปลอดภัยในต่างโลก
It's Sudden, But I Came To Another World! But I Hope To Live Safely
synopsis: "Understanding" is "Stronger" than a Sword! There is no magic without any weapons! But! This is the story of a man who wishes to live safely! "So, I've come to a different world." That man stood alone in a mountain full of plants and creatures that he never knew nor saw before. He goes down the mountain by avoiding encounters with a big slime (and bandits), and is caught as a suspicious person in the castle he reaches. In interrogation the female knight Ilius met at the imprisoned place, when talking about the bandits seen in the mountain, Irias, who was stuck in the search for said bandits, hurriedly strikes the bandits . My wish to be a brave man, or to build a harem? "I just want to live in a safe place" - a story that such a man survives the different world with "Understanding" as a weapon!

synonyms: 冷淡的佐藤同學只對我撒嬌
Aren’t You Too Sweet Salt-God Sato-San?
The Salt-God Sato-san is only sweet to me!
คุณซาโต้ยอดนักเมิน เธอหวานใส่ผมแค่คนเดียว
The Cold Sato is Only Sweet to Me
synopsis: Satou-san is the unattainable flower of the class. She is always cold and curt with classmates, but only I know she's actually very cute when she smiles, even if she's not much of a photographer. Oshio-kun is friendly and lively, but only I know he works at his family's cafe after school. He does a great job with the cafe's SNS account, and his mischievous smile makes my heart skip a beat! Innocent and sweet, but sometimes frustrating, this is a 120%-pure fluffy story about two people falling in love for the first time.

titleRomaji: Kono Inu to Kitara Mago no Koto shika Kangaeteinai: Kensei Maou no Yarinokoshi
titleNative: この犬ときたら孫のことしか考えていない～犬生魔王のやり遺し～
synopsis: The "Demonic Invasion" lasted for hundreds of years, and countless heroes were cut down by the Demon Lord during their reign…! Until the hero Terios, known as The Last Hope, finally defeated the Demon Lord and brought peace to the land. But the hero Terios vanished, and the Demon Lord, thought to be dead, is miraculously reborn… as a dog!? This is the story of the last Demon Lord, now all soft and fluffy, desperately trying to live a peaceful life while protecting his granddaughter, now a fugitive targeted by all of creation. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Ring ni Kakero
titleRomaji: Ring ni Kakero
titleNative: リングにかけろ
synopsis: Takane Kiku and Takane Ryuji are the children of a legendary world contender boxer. Kiku, the daughter seems to have inherited her father's boxing sense and tries to teach Ryuji to become a world contender. However, Ryuji hates boxing and gets picked on. After Kiku and Ryuji leave their hometown for Tokyo, Ryuji eventually learns to discover a passion for boxing after an encounter with a boxing prodigy, Kenzaki Jun. This will eventually lead him to learn crazy moves and out of this world opponents to become one of Japan's top junior boxers. (Source: Anime News Network)
